title: Quick Guide - Translations
scenario: Quick Guide translations are incorrect or missing across supported languages in the Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app.
2. Navigate to Home → Account → App Settings → Language.
3. Select a supported language from the list.
5. On the Home screen, locate and tap the Quick Guide entry point (e.g., Help/Info icon or menu).
6. Swipe or tap through each screen of the Quick Guide.
7. Verify that all text elements (headings, body text, labels, buttons) are properly translated and displayed without truncation, placeholder text, or untranslated source strings.
8. Repeat steps 2–7 for every supported language available in the app.
expected: All Quick Guide text is properly translated and displayed in the selected language, with no untranslated strings, truncation, or formatting issues.
